g.title: vandelay.import_item_attr_definition:owner->actor.org_unit:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (owner) REFERENCES actor.org_unit(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: vandelay.import_item:definition->vandelay.import_item_attr_definition:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (definition) REFERENCES vandelay.import_item_attr_definition(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: vandelay.bib_queue:item_attr_def->vandelay.import_item_attr_definition:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (item_attr_def) REFERENCES vandelay.import_item_attr_definition(id) ON DELETE SET NULL DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
